channel.title: uptime on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in uptime on IT notes

item.title: aws uptime
item.description: AWS >= 657 days OS: FreeBSD 8.2 AWS: us-east-1 Type: t1.micro

item.title: uptime 1000 days
item.description: uptime >= 1000 days OS: FreeBSD + ZFS + Jails Server: Dell PowerEdge 2900 2xE5420 24GB RAM Colocation: https://iweb.com/ Time to reboot after 4 years: I need to rebuild the RAID and can’t mix SAS drives with SATA on an living array:
